title: Testing & Quality Pipeline
description: End-to-end quality setup: unit tests with Vitest, E2E tests with Playwright, linting with ESLint flat config, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.

steps.description: Set up Vitest for unit and integration tests
Add Playwright for end-to-end browser testing
Configure ESLint v9 flat config for code quality
Wire up CI pipeline to run tests and lint on every push
